title: Our Team
subtitle: Meet the experts behind TwelfthKey—experienced consultants, researchers, and operational excellence practitioners.

whyDescription: Our team combines deep academic research with real-world operational experience. We've helped dozens of companies transform their operations using proven methodologies and intelligent platforms.
